title: ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR HUMAN DEVELOPMENT ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Adult Outpatient services work with adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, couples, family, and group therapy that focus on wellness recovery, solution-focused plans, cognitive and dialectical issues, Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder, and substance abuse. 2301 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 962-8800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 962-8800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8-5:30pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
